title: Provanto Ultimate Fruit and Vegetable Bug Killer, 1L - Fast Acting Bug Spray - 2 Weeks Protection for Fruit and Vegetable Plants - Contact Insecticide for Indoor & Outdoor Plants
features: BUG KILLER: A fast acting contact bug killer that kills most common insect pests
2 WEEKS PROTECTION: Protects from pests for up to 2 weeks, offering you piece of mind that your plant is safe from further attack
EASY TO USE: Convenient, ready to use spray with twist and lock function for quick application
SUITABLE FOR: Can be used to protect a wide range of crops, including such as apples, pears, runner beans, lettuce and much more
INDOOR AND GARDEN: Suitable for use both indoors and outdoors
description: From the manufacturer TARGETED CONTROL Effective control of common fruit and vegetable insect pests like Greenfly, Caterpillars, Fruit Moths, and much more for up to 2 weeks. EASY TO USE SOLUTION Provanto Ultimate Fruit & Vegetable Bug Killer is the convenient, ready to use bug spray that gives fast-acting effective control on contact. GROW YOUR OWN PROTECTION Can be used to protect a wide range of over 50 crops, including such as apples, pears, runner beans, and lettuce.
